title: Bare Bones Plus
description: Refresh your Minecraft gaming experience with Bare Bones Plus!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/C35IRiIwO2U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 📌 what's Bare Bones Plus?
**Bare Bones Plus** — is a large-scale resource pack that expands the original [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) style while supporting over 130 mods. Its main goal is to refresh the visuals and enhance the gameplay experience by preserving the minimalist and clean look of the original pack, while adding compatibility with a wide range of popular modifications. This pack allows players to enjoy a unified visual style even when playing with extensive modpacks.

It is recommended to use the resourcepack above the original [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) resourcepack:
![123](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbd15d69871352425170a997eb5d53127c7f1dd9.png)

## ⚙️ compatibility
Compatibility more than 130+ mods!
